name: qwen3-tts
description: A unified Text-to-Speech demo featuring three powerful modes: Voice, Clone and Design

language.description: Language of the text (use 'auto' for automatic detection)
language.title: language

mode.description: TTS mode: 'custom_voice' uses preset speakers, 'voice_clone' clones from reference audio, 'voice_design' creates voice from description
mode.title: mode

reference_audio.description: Reference audio file for voice cloning (only for 'voice_clone' mode)
reference_audio.title: Reference Audio

reference_text.description: Transcript of the reference audio (recommended for 'voice_clone' mode)
reference_text.title: Reference Text

style_instruction.description: Optional style/emotion instruction (e.g., 'speak slowly and calmly', 'excited tone')
style_instruction.title: Style Instruction

voice_description.description: Natural language description of desired voice (only for 'voice_design' mode). Example: 'A warm, friendly female voice with a slight British accent'
voice_description.title: Voice Description
